Enumeration Case# kSBCModePageFlexibleDisk_SSN_Mask

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.3+

```
kSBCModePageFlexibleDisk_SSN_Mask = (1 << kSBCModePageFlexibleDisk_SSN_Bit)
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/1555525-trdy_ssn_mo_bitfields/ksbcmodepageflexibledisk_ssn_mask#discussion)
